Notice.NoticeDef.label: CELETECH 2025/12/31-2026/1/1 EMERGENCY Update Notice
Notice.NoticeDef.description:
HAPPY NEW YEAR!

New Features:
Added a trade/airstrike/point shop window.
Floating Gun/Funnel System Rework.
New Weapon Accesory System(recently only available for some weapons).
New Weapon Skin System(recently only available for some weapons).
Added new research related to bullet penetration.

Bug Fixes:
Fixed an issue with cross-map shelling.
Fixed turret height issues in CE and various other weapon bugs.
Fixed sound effect issues for laser weapons.
Fixed XML issues for certain buildings.
Fixed an issue where Air Conditioners would sometimes fail to work.
Fixed an issue where weapons dealt incorrect multiplied damage or inflicted damage even when intercepted by shields.
Fixed incorrect landing behavior of Trade Shuttles.

Optimizations and Adjustments:
Optimized turret targeting logic and performance; optimized turret animations.
Optimized weapon rendering, as well as dynamic projectile textures and trails in Vanilla.
Optimized Anti-Air system performance and interception efficiency.
Optimized some weapon textures (remaining textures are still in progress).
Bullet damage and penetration in CE are now calculated based on CE formulas.

EMERGENCY BUG FIX on 12/31:
Fixed statworker for existing saves.
Fixed a problem that piercing/homing projectiles are not dealing damage.
Added hyperlinks and more information in weapon/accessory/funnel hauler infor panles.
Fixed sound sustainer error caused by laser weapons.

For existing saves: Please destroy turrets before updating, or download the previous version from GitHub.
